Dissotis pauciflora, a flowering plant species, is native to tropical Africa. It is used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The bioactive constituents of Dissotis pauciflora include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
